consts:
Pure-Python range coder for seg_targets compression.

Stdlib-only (no constriction, no numpy needed for the coder core -- numpy
used only for input-prep helpers outside the hot loop). Shipped in the
scoring archive.

Bitstream format (standard carry-less 32-bit range coder):
- 32-bit state (low, high), byte-level renormalization
- frequency tables are fixed-point uint16 (total_freq = 2^precision, typically 1<<16)
- symbols are uint8 in range [0, n_classes)

This is the Witten/Neal/Cleary arithmetic-coding algorithm rewritten with
plain 32-bit ints and E1/E2/E3 renormalization. Implementation is
byte-identical lossless by construction (encode/decode share arithmetic).
doc:
Pure-Python range coder for seg_targets compression.

Stdlib-only (no constriction, no numpy needed for the coder core -- numpy
used only for input-prep helpers outside the hot loop). Shipped in the
scoring archive.

Bitstream format (standard carry-less 32-bit range coder):
- 32-bit state (low, high), byte-level renormalization
- frequency tables are fixed-point uint16 (total_freq = 2^precision, typically 1<<16)
- symbols are uint8 in range [0, n_classes)

This is the Witten/Neal/Cleary arithmetic-coding algorithm rewritten with
plain 32-bit ints and E1/E2/E3 renormalization. Implementation is
byte-identical lossless by construction (encode/decode share arithmetic).

child_codes.name: decode_target
child_codes.doc:
Return the 'offset' in [0, total) that the current state decodes to.

        Caller must then look up which symbol owns this offset under the same
        CDF as the encoder used, and pass cum_low/cum_high to advance().
child_codes.dis:

122           2 LOAD_FAST                0 (self)
              4 LOAD_ATTR                0 (high)
             24 LOAD_FAST                0 (self)
             26 LOAD_ATTR                2 (low)
             46 BINARY_OP               10 (-)
             50 LOAD_CONST               1 (1)
             52 BINARY_OP                0 (+)
             56 STORE_FAST               2 (rng)

123          58 LOAD_FAST                0 (self)
             60 LOAD_ATTR                4 (code)
             80 LOAD_FAST                0 (self)
             82 LOAD_ATTR                2 (low)
            102 BINARY_OP               10 (-)
            106 LOAD_CONST               1 (1)
            108 BINARY_OP                0 (+)
            112 LOAD_FAST                1 (total)
            114 BINARY_OP                5 (*)
            118 LOAD_CONST               1 (1)
            120 BINARY_OP               10 (-)
            124 LOAD_FAST                2 (rng)
            126 BINARY_OP                2 (//)
            130 RETURN_VALUE

module_dis:
0           0 RESUME                   0

  1           2 LOAD_CONST               0 ('Pure-Python range coder for seg_targets compression.\n\nStdlib-only (no constriction, no numpy needed for the coder core -- numpy\nused only for input-prep helpers outside the hot loop). Shipped in the\nscoring archive.\n\nBitstream format (standard carry-less 32-bit range coder):\n- 32-bit state (low, high), byte-level renormalization\n- frequency tables are fixed-point uint16 (total_freq = 2^precision, typically 1<<16)\n- symbols are uint8 in range [0, n_classes)\n\nThis is the Witten/Neal/Cleary arithmetic-coding algorithm rewritten with\nplain 32-bit ints and E1/E2/E3 renormalization. Implementation is\nbyte-identical lossless by construction (encode/decode share arithmetic).\n')
